title: Upgraded Glass
description: Glass does not break when mined, emits light, only players can pass through, and some secret glass.
body:
# DESCRIPTION
Upgraded Glass adds new types of glass. - a glass does not break when mined. - a special glass which emits light. - a glass thats blocks light but transparent. - a glass that allows player to walk through but not other mobs. - a glass thats act as secret glass.

# FEATURES
Spoiler When in-game press **SHIFT** to reveal each features. **Upgraded Glass** - Almost indestructible. **Illuminating Glass** - Almost indestructible. - Emits light. **Light Blocking Glass** - Almost indestructible - Transparent but blocks light. **Ethereal Glass** - Almost indestructible. - Allows players to walk through it but prevent other mobs pass. **Secret Glass** - Almost indestructible. - Light cannot pass through. - One side of the glass is camouflage.
#
Your support is very much appreciated 😊 [![Donate via Ko-fi](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/9fzfevkxtje7qus10kfb2/400-63-kofi_button_red-2.png?rlkey=neocwsdasxcn8syd6xvybldgp&st=6uwwgv4n&raw=1)](https://ko-fi.com/sorasetsuna) #
Can I use this in my modpack? - Yes, you may.
